---
title: "Glossary"
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
bibliography: ../references.bib
number-sections: false
execute:
  freeze: false
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/glossary_build.py; edit docs/glossary/terms.yml. -->

::: {.glossary-page}

::: {.glossary-intro}
**28 terms** across **8 categories**. The canonical source is
`docs/glossary/terms.yml`; generated Quarto, Typst, KG, and shortcode artifacts
share the same definitions.

Use `{{{< gls term-id >}}}` for the linked short label and
`{{{< glsfull term-id >}}}` for the linked full label in QMD pages.
:::

<nav class="glossary-category-index" aria-label="Glossary categories">
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-dataset">Dataset <span>9</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-entity">Entity <span>1</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-geometry">Geometry <span>3</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-metrics">Metrics <span>3</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-model">Model <span>4</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-planning">Planning <span>3</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-reconstruction">Reconstruction <span>4</span></a>
<a class="glossary-chip glossary-category-chip" href="#glossary-category-supervision">Supervision <span>1</span></a>
</nav>

## Dataset {#glossary-category-dataset}

<div class="glossary-card-grid">

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-virtual-reality-standard">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Virtual Reality Standard</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">VRS</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">dataset.file_format</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>VRS file</code> <code>Project Aria VRS</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">File format used by Project Aria tooling to store multi-modal sensor recordings efficiently.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">VRS is part of the upstream Project Aria ecosystem, while ARIA-NBV primarily consumes ASE/ATEK-derived tensorized snippets for current experiments.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-snippet">snippet</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-multi-frame-camera-data">MFCD</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-motion-trajectory-data">MTD</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="setup.html" title="docs/contents/setup.qmd">Setup Instructions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="ase_dataset.html" title="docs/contents/ase_dataset.qmd">Aria Synthetic Environments (ASE) Dataset</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-ProjectAria-ASE-2025">&#64;ProjectAria-ASE-2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-central-pupil-frame">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Central Pupil Frame</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">CPF</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">dataset.frames</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>central pupil coordinate frame</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Coordinate frame placed at the midpoint between the left and right eye boxes of Project Aria glasses.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">CPF is used by Project Aria for gaze-related quantities and should remain distinct from rig, camera, world, and PyTorch3D frames in ARIA-NBV docs.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-left-up-forward">LUF</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-visual-inertial-odometry">VIO</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="ase_dataset.html" title="docs/contents/ase_dataset.qmd">Aria Synthetic Environments (ASE) Dataset</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-ProjectAria-ASE-2025">&#64;ProjectAria-ASE-2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-machine-perception-services">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Machine Perception Services</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">MPS</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">dataset.project_aria</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>Project Aria MPS</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Project Aria processing services that derive pose, mapping, gaze, hand, and related perception outputs from sensor recordings.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">ARIA-NBV mainly depends on MPS-style pose and semi-dense mapping products as the current reconstruction state for RRI computation.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-simultaneous-localization-and-mapping">SLAM</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-point-cloud">PC</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-visual-inertial-odometry">VIO</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="ase_dataset.html" title="docs/contents/ase_dataset.qmd">Aria Synthetic Environments (ASE) Dataset</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/semi-dense-pc.html" title="docs/contents/theory/semi-dense-pc.qmd">Semi-Dense Point Clouds</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-ProjectAria-ASE-2025">&#64;ProjectAria-ASE-2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-snippet">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Snippet</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">snippet</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">dataset.sample</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>temporal window</code> <code>ASE snippet</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Short synchronized temporal window of Aria sensor data used as one EVL/VIN input sample.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">A snippet typically contains RGB or grayscale streams, poses, calibration, semi-dense points, and scene metadata that EVL lifts into a voxel grid.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-aria-synthetic-environments">ASE</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-egocentric-voxel-lifting">EVL</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-view-introspection-network">VIN</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="ase_dataset.html" title="docs/contents/ase_dataset.qmd">Aria Synthetic Environments (ASE) Dataset</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/data_pipeline_overview.html" title="docs/contents/impl/data_pipeline_overview.qmd">ASE Data Pipeline &amp; Streamlit Usage</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/vin_nbv.html" title="docs/contents/impl/vin_nbv.qmd">Aria-VIN-NBV (VINv3)</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-ProjectAria-ASE-2025">&#64;ProjectAria-ASE-2025</a> <a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-EFM3D-straub2024">&#64;EFM3D-straub2024</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-scene-script-language">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">SceneScript Language</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">SSL</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">dataset.scene_representation</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>Structure Scene Language</code> <code>SceneScript structured language</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Structured language representation for indoor scene layout using primitives such as walls, doors, windows, and objects.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">SceneScript is relevant to ARIA-NBV as a possible semantic/global planning layer and as one source of ASE scene-structure context.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-aria-synthetic-environments">ASE</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-of-interest">target</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-next-best-view">NBV</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="literature/scene_script.html" title="docs/contents/literature/scene_script.qmd">SceneScript</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="ase_dataset.html" title="docs/contents/ase_dataset.qmd">Aria Synthetic Environments (ASE) Dataset</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-SceneScript-avetisyan2024">&#64;SceneScript-avetisyan2024</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-motion-trajectory-data">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Motion Trajectory Data</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">MTD</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">dataset.stream</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>trajectory data</code> <code>pose stream</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Device poses over time, usually represented as a sequence of 6-DoF transformations.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">MTD supplies the logged egocentric trajectory used to define snippet state, current reconstruction context, and candidate-view reference poses.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-snippet">snippet</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-visual-inertial-odometry">VIO</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-candidate-view">candidate</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="ase_dataset.html" title="docs/contents/ase_dataset.qmd">Aria Synthetic Environments (ASE) Dataset</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/data_pipeline_overview.html" title="docs/contents/impl/data_pipeline_overview.qmd">ASE Data Pipeline &amp; Streamlit Usage</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-ProjectAria-ASE-2025">&#64;ProjectAria-ASE-2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-multi-frame-camera-data">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Multi-Frame Camera Data</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">MFCD</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">dataset.stream</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>multi-camera frame data</code> <code>synchronized camera data</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Synchronized camera streams from multiple Project Aria cameras over a temporal window.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">MFCD provides the egocentric image evidence consumed by EVL and aligned with pose, calibration, and semi-dense point streams.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-snippet">snippet</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-egocentric-voxel-lifting">EVL</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-visual-inertial-odometry">VIO</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="ase_dataset.html" title="docs/contents/ase_dataset.qmd">Aria Synthetic Environments (ASE) Dataset</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="literature/efm3d.html" title="docs/contents/literature/efm3d.qmd">EFM3D and EVL</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-ProjectAria-ASE-2025">&#64;ProjectAria-ASE-2025</a> <a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-EFM3D-straub2024">&#64;EFM3D-straub2024</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-multi-semi-dense-point-data">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Multi-Semi-Dense Point Data</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">MSDPD</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">dataset.stream</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>multi-frame semi-dense points</code> <code>semi-dense point stream</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Semi-dense 3D point observations generated by SLAM-style processing across a snippet or trajectory window.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">MSDPD is the sparse observed geometry that ARIA-NBV fuses with candidate point clouds and compares against ground-truth meshes for RRI labels.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-point-cloud">PC</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-simultaneous-localization-and-mapping">SLAM</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/semi-dense-pc.html" title="docs/contents/theory/semi-dense-pc.qmd">Semi-Dense Point Clouds</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/rri_computation.html" title="docs/contents/impl/rri_computation.qmd">Computing RRI with Ground Truth Meshes</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-ProjectAria-ASE-2025">&#64;ProjectAria-ASE-2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-aria-synthetic-environments">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Aria Synthetic Environments</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">ASE</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">dataset.synthetic</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>Aria Synthetic Environment</code> <code>ASE dataset</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Large-scale synthetic indoor dataset with simulated Project Aria sensor characteristics, egocentric trajectories, and scene annotations.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">ARIA-NBV uses ASE snippets and the public mesh-supervised subset to generate oracle RRI labels from ground-truth meshes and semi-dense point clouds.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-snippet">snippet</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-egocentric-foundation-model-3d">EFM3D</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oracle-rri">oracle RRI</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="ase_dataset.html" title="docs/contents/ase_dataset.qmd">Aria Synthetic Environments (ASE) Dataset</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="setup.html#aria-synthetic-environments" title="docs/contents/setup.qmd#aria-synthetic-environments">Setup Instructions</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-ProjectAria-ASE-2025">&#64;ProjectAria-ASE-2025</a> <a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-EFM3D-straub2024">&#64;EFM3D-straub2024</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

</div>

## Entity {#glossary-category-entity}

<div class="glossary-card-grid">

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-target-of-interest">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Target of Interest</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">target</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">entity.targeting</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>target entity</code> <code>object of interest</code> <code>inspection target</code> <code>task target</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Selected entity, object crop, point, region, or surface-deficit hypothesis whose reconstruction quality should be improved.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">Target-conditioned ARIA-NBV variants use this target as an explicit input to candidate scoring and planning instead of optimizing only scene-level RRI.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-specific-rri">target RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-conditioned-scorer">target-conditioned scorer</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oriented-bounding-box">OBB</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq2-target-encoding" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq2-target-encoding">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq4-model" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq4-model">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/vin_v2_feature_proposals.html" title="docs/contents/impl/vin_v2_feature_proposals.qmd">VIN v2 Feature + Encoding Proposals</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

</div>

## Geometry {#glossary-category-geometry}

<div class="glossary-card-grid">

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-oriented-bounding-box">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Oriented Bounding Box</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">OBB</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">geometry.annotation</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>oriented box</code> <code>object box</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">3D bounding box with arbitrary orientation, used to represent object extent more tightly than an axis-aligned box.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">OBBs are a natural target encoding for entity-aware ARIA-NBV because they provide center, extent, orientation, semantic class, and confidence signals.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-of-interest">target</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-conditioned-scorer">target-conditioned scorer</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-egocentric-voxel-lifting">EVL</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="ase_dataset.html#oriented-bounding-boxes" title="docs/contents/ase_dataset.qmd#oriented-bounding-boxes">Aria Synthetic Environments (ASE) Dataset</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq2-target-encoding" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq2-target-encoding">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/vin_v2_feature_proposals.html" title="docs/contents/impl/vin_v2_feature_proposals.qmd">VIN v2 Feature + Encoding Proposals</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-EFM3D-straub2024">&#64;EFM3D-straub2024</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-frustum">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Frustum</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">frustum</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">geometry.camera</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>viewing frustum</code> <code>camera frustum</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Truncated pyramidal camera-visible volume bounded by near and far clipping planes plus lateral field-of-view planes.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">Candidate-view frusta define which scene surfaces can project into a camera image and are therefore central to visibility, rendering, and RRI diagnostics.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-candidate-view">candidate</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-egocentric-voxel-lifting">EVL</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-point-cloud">PC</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/rri_computation.html" title="docs/contents/impl/rri_computation.qmd">Computing RRI with Ground Truth Meshes</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/vin_nbv.html" title="docs/contents/impl/vin_nbv.qmd">Aria-VIN-NBV (VINv3)</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-Frustum-Wikipedia-2025">&#64;Frustum-Wikipedia-2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-left-up-forward">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Left-Up-Forward</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">LUF</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">geometry.frames</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>LUF frame</code> <code>left up forward</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Camera coordinate convention whose x axis points left, y axis points up, and z axis points forward.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">LUF is one of the coordinate-frame conventions that must stay explicit when moving between Project Aria cameras, PyTorch3D cameras, and ARIA-NBV candidate poses.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-candidate-view">candidate</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-frustum">frustum</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="../typst/paper/sections/05-coordinate-conventions.typ" title="docs/typst/paper/sections/05-coordinate-conventions.typ">05 Coordinate Conventions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="../typst/paper/sections/12f-appendix-pose-frames.typ" title="docs/typst/paper/sections/12f-appendix-pose-frames.typ">12F Appendix Pose Frames</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

</div>

## Metrics {#glossary-category-metrics}

<div class="glossary-card-grid">

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Relative Reconstruction Improvement</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">RRI</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">metrics.reconstruction_quality</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>reconstruction-quality gain</code> <code>relative quality improvement</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Metric quantifying the relative reconstruction-quality improvement obtained by adding a candidate observation to the current reconstruction.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">ARIA-NBV computes RRI by comparing reconstruction error before and after fusing candidate-view geometry, usually against an ASE ground-truth mesh for oracle supervision and evaluation.</p>

<div class="glossary-formula">
\[
\mathrm{RRI}(q)=\frac{d(P_t,M)-d(P_t\cup P_q,M)}{d(P_t,M)+\varepsilon}
\]
</div>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oracle-rri">oracle RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-specific-rri">target RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-candidate-view">candidate</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/rri_theory.html" title="docs/contents/theory/rri_theory.qmd">Relative Reconstruction Improvement (RRI) Theory</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/rri_computation.html" title="docs/contents/impl/rri_computation.qmd">Computing RRI with Ground Truth Meshes</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="literature/vin_nbv.html" title="docs/contents/literature/vin_nbv.qmd">VIN-NBV</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-target-specific-rri">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Target-Specific RRI</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">target RRI</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">metrics.reconstruction_quality</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>entity RRI</code> <code>object RRI</code> <code>target RRI</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">RRI computed only on the ground-truth and reconstructed geometry associated with a selected target of interest.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">Target-specific RRI lets the thesis compare views by how much they improve a selected object or region, even when scene-level RRI would prefer large background surfaces.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-of-interest">target</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-acquisition-cost">cost</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq1-objective" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq1-objective">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq4-model" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq4-model">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/rri_computation.html#entity-wise-rri" title="docs/contents/impl/rri_computation.qmd#entity-wise-rri">Computing RRI with Ground Truth Meshes</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-ground-truth">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Ground Truth</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">GT</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">metrics.reference</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>reference annotation</code> <code>oracle reference</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Reference data or annotations treated as the trusted target for training, validation, or evaluation.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">In ARIA-NBV, ground truth usually refers to ASE meshes, object annotations, poses, or labels used to compute oracle supervision and diagnostic metrics.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oracle-rri">oracle RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oriented-bounding-box">OBB</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="ase_dataset.html" title="docs/contents/ase_dataset.qmd">Aria Synthetic Environments (ASE) Dataset</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/rri_computation.html" title="docs/contents/impl/rri_computation.qmd">Computing RRI with Ground Truth Meshes</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-ProjectAria-ASE-2025">&#64;ProjectAria-ASE-2025</a> <a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-EFM3D-straub2024">&#64;EFM3D-straub2024</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

</div>

## Model {#glossary-category-model}

<div class="glossary-card-grid">

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-egocentric-foundation-model-3d">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Egocentric Foundation Model 3D</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">EFM3D</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">model.backbone</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>EFM</code> <code>egocentric foundation model</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Egocentric 3D foundation-model stack used as the frozen spatial backbone for ARIA-NBV candidate scoring.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">The current project uses EFM3D and its EVL architecture to expose voxel occupancy, centerness, semantic, and OBB evidence for VIN-style RRI prediction.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-egocentric-voxel-lifting">EVL</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-view-introspection-network">VIN</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-aria-synthetic-environments">ASE</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="literature/efm3d.html" title="docs/contents/literature/efm3d.qmd">EFM3D and EVL</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="ext-impl/efm3d_implementation.html" title="docs/contents/ext-impl/efm3d_implementation.qmd">EFM3D Implementation Index</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/vin_nbv.html" title="docs/contents/impl/vin_nbv.qmd">Aria-VIN-NBV (VINv3)</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-EFM3D-straub2024">&#64;EFM3D-straub2024</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-egocentric-voxel-lifting">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Egocentric Voxel Lifting</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">EVL</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">model.backbone</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>voxel lifting</code> <code>EVL backbone</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">EFM3D architecture that lifts synchronized egocentric observations into a gravity-aligned 3D voxel feature volume.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">ARIA-NBV uses EVL head outputs and voxel evidence as the frozen scene representation for VIN-style RRI prediction.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-egocentric-foundation-model-3d">EFM3D</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-view-introspection-network">VIN</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oriented-bounding-box">OBB</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="literature/efm3d.html" title="docs/contents/literature/efm3d.qmd">EFM3D and EVL</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="ext-impl/efm3d_implementation.html" title="docs/contents/ext-impl/efm3d_implementation.qmd">EFM3D Implementation Index</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="../reference/aria_nbv.vin.backbone_evl.EvlBackbone.html" title="docs/reference/aria_nbv.vin.backbone_evl.EvlBackbone.qmd">EvlBackbone</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-EFM3D-straub2024">&#64;EFM3D-straub2024</a> <a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-EVL-Doc-2025">&#64;EVL-Doc-2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-target-conditioned-scorer">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Target-Conditioned Scorer</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">target-conditioned scorer</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">model.scoring</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>target-conditioned VIN</code> <code>target-aware scorer</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">VIN-style candidate scorer that receives scene state, a candidate view, and an encoding of the target of interest.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">The scorer predicts target-specific utility so view ranking can prioritize a selected entity or region instead of only optimizing scene-level RRI.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-of-interest">target</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-specific-rri">target RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-view-introspection-network">VIN</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq4-model" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq4-model">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/vin_nbv.html" title="docs/contents/impl/vin_nbv.qmd">Aria-VIN-NBV (VINv3)</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="../reference/aria_nbv.vin.model_v3.VinModelV3.html" title="docs/reference/aria_nbv.vin.model_v3.VinModelV3.qmd">VinModelV3</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-view-introspection-network">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">View Introspection Network</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">VIN</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">model.scoring</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>VIN scorer</code> <code>VIN-NBV model</code> <code>Aria-VIN-NBV</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Learned candidate-view scorer that predicts RRI or an ordinal RRI-derived utility without capturing the candidate view.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">ARIA-NBV adapts VIN-NBV by placing a lightweight RRI prediction head on top of frozen EVL features and candidate-pose evidence from ASE snippets.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-conditioned-scorer">target-conditioned scorer</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-egocentric-voxel-lifting">EVL</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="literature/vin_nbv.html" title="docs/contents/literature/vin_nbv.qmd">VIN-NBV</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/vin_nbv.html" title="docs/contents/impl/vin_nbv.qmd">Aria-VIN-NBV (VINv3)</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="../reference/aria_nbv.vin.model_v3.VinModelV3.html" title="docs/reference/aria_nbv.vin.model_v3.VinModelV3.qmd">VinModelV3</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

</div>

## Planning {#glossary-category-planning}

<div class="glossary-card-grid">

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-candidate-view">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Candidate View</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">candidate</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">planning.action</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>candidate pose</code> <code>candidate viewpoint</code> <code>next-view candidate</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Proposed camera pose whose expected reconstruction utility is evaluated before selecting the next observation.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">ARIA-NBV samples candidate views around a reference pose or target, renders candidate depths from the mesh for oracle labels, and scores candidates with RRI or learned VIN predictions.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-next-best-view">NBV</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oracle-rri">oracle RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-conditioned-scorer">target-conditioned scorer</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq3-candidates" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq3-candidates">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/rri_computation.html" title="docs/contents/impl/rri_computation.qmd">Computing RRI with Ground Truth Meshes</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="../reference/aria_nbv.pose_generation.CandidateViewGenerator.html" title="docs/reference/aria_nbv.pose_generation.CandidateViewGenerator.qmd">CandidateViewGenerator</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-acquisition-cost">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Acquisition Cost</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">cost</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">planning.objective</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>capture budget</code> <code>view budget</code> <code>motion cost</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Budget consumed to acquire observations, measured by view count, path length, elapsed time, invalid-action rate, or a weighted combination.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">The thesis should first report cumulative target RRI and acquisition cost separately, then use scalarized objectives only when the tradeoff is explicit.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-target-specific-rri">target RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-candidate-view">candidate</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-next-best-view">NBV</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#rq1-objective" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#rq1-objective">Master Thesis Research Questions</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/roadmap.html#roadmap-m5" title="docs/contents/thesis/roadmap.qmd#roadmap-m5">Master Thesis Roadmap</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-next-best-view">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Next-Best-View</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">NBV</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">planning.view_selection</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>next best view</code> <code>viewpoint selection</code> <code>view planning</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Problem of selecting the next sensor viewpoint to improve an active reconstruction or inspection objective under a limited acquisition budget.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">In ARIA-NBV, the preferred objective is reconstruction quality improvement rather than coverage alone, with candidate views ranked by oracle or learned RRI scores.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-candidate-view">candidate</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-view-introspection-network">VIN</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/nbv_background.html" title="docs/contents/theory/nbv_background.qmd">NBV Background</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/roadmap.html" title="docs/contents/thesis/roadmap.qmd">Master Thesis Roadmap</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/questions.html#research-questions" title="docs/contents/thesis/questions.qmd#research-questions">Master Thesis Research Questions</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a> <a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-GenNBV-chen2024">&#64;GenNBV-chen2024</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

</div>

## Reconstruction {#glossary-category-reconstruction}

<div class="glossary-card-grid">

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-track">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Track</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">track</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">reconstruction.features</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>feature track</code> <code>2D track</code> <code>SLAM track</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Temporal sequence of corresponding image-feature detections across frames, usually carrying per-frame image coordinates, timestamps, and camera IDs.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">Tracks can be triangulated or optimized into 3D points, making them a bridge between image evidence and the semi-dense point clouds used by ARIA-NBV.</p>

<div class="glossary-formula">
\[
\mathcal{T}=\{(u_k,v_k,\mathrm{cam}_k,t_k)\}_{k=0}^{N}
\]
</div>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-point-cloud">PC</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-simultaneous-localization-and-mapping">SLAM</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-visual-inertial-odometry">VIO</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/semi-dense-pc.html" title="docs/contents/theory/semi-dense-pc.qmd">Semi-Dense Point Clouds</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-visual-inertial-odometry">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Visual-Inertial Odometry</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">VIO</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">reconstruction.pose</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>visual inertial odometry</code> <code>inertial visual odometry</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Pose-estimation method that combines visual measurements from cameras with inertial measurements from IMUs.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">Project Aria pose and mapping products build on visual-inertial estimation, and ARIA-NBV depends on those pose streams for snippet state and candidate frame contracts.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-simultaneous-localization-and-mapping">SLAM</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-motion-trajectory-data">MTD</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="ase_dataset.html" title="docs/contents/ase_dataset.qmd">Aria Synthetic Environments (ASE) Dataset</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/semi-dense-pc.html" title="docs/contents/theory/semi-dense-pc.qmd">Semi-Dense Point Clouds</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-ProjectAria-ASE-2025">&#64;ProjectAria-ASE-2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-point-cloud">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Point Cloud</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">PC</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">reconstruction.representation</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>3D points</code> <code>semi-dense point cloud</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Set of 3D points representing observed scene geometry.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">ARIA-NBV compares current and candidate-fused point clouds against ground-truth meshes to compute oracle RRI and surface-distance diagnostics.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-oracle-rri">oracle RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-simultaneous-localization-and-mapping">SLAM</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/semi-dense-pc.html" title="docs/contents/theory/semi-dense-pc.qmd">Semi-Dense Point Clouds</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/surface_metrics.html" title="docs/contents/theory/surface_metrics.qmd">Surface Reconstruction Metrics</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/rri_computation.html" title="docs/contents/impl/rri_computation.qmd">Computing RRI with Ground Truth Meshes</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-simultaneous-localization-and-mapping">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Simultaneous Localization and Mapping</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">SLAM</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">reconstruction.state</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>visual SLAM</code> <code>mapping and localization</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">Method for estimating sensor motion while building a map of the surrounding scene.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">In ARIA-NBV, logged SLAM poses and semi-dense points form the current reconstruction state against which candidate-view RRI is evaluated.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-point-cloud">PC</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-snippet">snippet</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="theory/semi-dense-pc.html" title="docs/contents/theory/semi-dense-pc.qmd">Semi-Dense Point Clouds</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="ase_dataset.html" title="docs/contents/ase_dataset.qmd">Aria Synthetic Environments (ASE) Dataset</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-ProjectAria-ASE-2025">&#64;ProjectAria-ASE-2025</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

</div>

## Supervision {#glossary-category-supervision}

<div class="glossary-card-grid">

<article class="glossary-card" id="term-oracle-rri">
<div class="glossary-card-header">
<div class="glossary-term-title">Oracle RRI</div>
<div class="glossary-term-badges">
<span class="glossary-badge glossary-badge-short">oracle RRI</span>
<span class="glossary-badge">supervision.oracle</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="glossary-aliases">
<span>Aliases</span>
<code>RRI oracle</code> <code>oracle label</code> <code>mesh-supervised RRI</code>
</div>

<p class="glossary-definition">RRI label computed with privileged ground-truth geometry, used for supervised training and evaluation.</p>

<p class="glossary-detail-text">The current oracle renders candidate depth maps from ASE ground-truth meshes, backprojects candidate point clouds, fuses them with the current semi-dense reconstruction, and scores the resulting surface-distance improvement.</p>

<details class="glossary-details">
<summary>Links and references</summary>
<div class="glossary-metadata">
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Related</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-relative-reconstruction-improvement">RRI</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-candidate-view">candidate</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="#term-aria-synthetic-environments">ASE</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>Docs</span><div><a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/rri_computation.html" title="docs/contents/impl/rri_computation.qmd">Computing RRI with Ground Truth Meshes</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="impl/data_pipeline_overview.html" title="docs/contents/impl/data_pipeline_overview.qmd">ASE Data Pipeline &amp; Streamlit Usage</a> <a class="glossary-chip" href="thesis/roadmap.html#roadmap-m1" title="docs/contents/thesis/roadmap.qmd#roadmap-m1">Master Thesis Roadmap</a></div></div>
<div class="glossary-metadata-row"><span>References</span><div><a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-VIN-NBV-frahm2025">&#64;VIN-NBV-frahm2025</a> <a class="glossary-chip glossary-citation" href="#ref-EFM3D-straub2024">&#64;EFM3D-straub2024</a></div></div>
</div>
</details>

</article>

</div>

::: {.glossary-citation-seed}
[@EFM3D-straub2024]; [@EVL-Doc-2025]; [@Frustum-Wikipedia-2025]; [@GenNBV-chen2024]; [@ProjectAria-ASE-2025]; [@SceneScript-avetisyan2024]; [@VIN-NBV-frahm2025]
:::

:::
